151.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about the mosque that was founded on piety. He said: 'It is my mosque.'
151.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang masjid yang didirikan atas ketakwaan. Beliau bersabda: 'Itu adalah masjidku.'

152.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The mosque that was founded on piety is this mosque of mine.'
152.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Masjid yang didirikan atas ketakwaan adalah masjidku ini.'

153.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Prophet ﷺ about the verse: 'And those who are pregnant — their term is that they deliver their burden.' He said: 'This applies to the thrice-divorced and to the widow.'
153.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang ayat: 'Dan wanita-wanita yang hamil — masa iddah mereka adalah sampai mereka melahirkan.' Beliau bersabda: 'Ini berlaku bagi wanita yang ditalak tiga dan bagi janda.'

154.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding the story of Musa (Moses) and al-Khidr, that when Musa said there was no one more knowledgeable than him, Allah inspired him to seek out a servant of His — al-Khidr — and made the fish a sign for him.
154.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang kisah Musa dan Khidir, bahwa ketika Musa berkata tidak ada yang lebih berilmu darinya, Allah mewahyukan kepadanya untuk mencari seorang hamba-Nya — Khidir — dan menjadikan ikan sebagai tanda baginya.

155.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that there was a disagreement with Umar about a ruling. Ibn Abbas came and said: 'Perhaps Ubayy has not forgotten.' Ubayy came forward and performed ablution, then said: 'A trace of fluid touched me, so I washed my private parts and performed ablution.'
155.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa terjadi perbedaan pendapat dengan Umar tentang suatu hukum. Ibn Abbas datang dan berkata: 'Mungkin Ubayy belum lupa.' Ubayy tampil dan berwudhu, lalu berkata: 'Sedikit cairan mengenai aku, jadi aku mencuci kemaluanku dan berwudhu.'

156.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that Umar heard him recite a verse differently. Umar said: 'What is this?' He said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ taught me to recite it this way.' Umar said: 'Shall I establish it in writing?' He said: 'Yes.'
156.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Umar mendengarnya membaca suatu ayat secara berbeda. Umar berkata: 'Apa ini?' Ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ mengajariku membacanya demikian.' Umar berkata: 'Haruskah aku menuliskannya?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.'

157.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said to Umar: 'O Commander of the Faithful, I received the Quran from one who received it — from Jibril (peace be upon him) — while it was fresh.'
157.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata kepada Umar: 'Wahai Amirul Mukminin, aku menerima Al-Quran dari orang yang menerimanya — dari Jibril (alaihi salam) — sementara ia masih segar.'

158.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through Ibn Abbas that he said: 'The last verse to be revealed was: There has certainly come to you a messenger from among yourselves.'
158.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui Ibn Abbas bahwa ia berkata: 'Ayat terakhir yang diturunkan adalah: Sungguh telah datang kepadamu seorang rasul dari kaummu sendiri.'

159.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) in the story of Musa and al-Khidr that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'May Allah have mercy on Musa — if only he had been patient, so that we could have been told more of their story.'
159.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dalam kisah Musa dan Khidir bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Semoga Allah merahmati Musa — andaikan ia bersabar, tentu kita akan diceritakan lebih banyak dari kisah mereka.'

160.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding the story of al-Khidr and Musa, that al-Khidr said: 'How can you be patient over what you do not encompass in knowledge?' Musa said: 'I have been commanded to do so.' Al-Khidr said: 'If you follow me, do not ask me about anything until I tell you about it myself.'
160.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang kisah Khidir dan Musa, bahwa Khidir berkata: 'Bagaimana kamu bisa bersabar atas apa yang tidak kamu ketahui?' Musa berkata: 'Aku telah diperintahkan untuk melakukannya.' Khidir berkata: 'Jika kamu mengikutiku, jangan tanya apapun kepadaku sampai aku sendiri yang menceritakannya.'

161.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that Musa and al-Khidr found small boats that carried people from one shore to another. The people recognized al-Khidr and carried him without payment. He then bored a hole in the boat by driving a stake into it.
161.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Musa dan Khidir menemukan perahu-perahu kecil yang membawa orang dari satu pantai ke pantai lain. Orang-orang mengenali Khidir dan membawanya tanpa pembayaran. Ia kemudian melubangi perahu dengan memakukan pasak ke dalamnya.

162.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) in the story of Musa and al-Khidr, that when Musa said there was no one more knowledgeable than him on earth, Allah revealed to him: 'In the earth there is a man more knowledgeable than you — go seek him.'
162.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dalam kisah Musa dan Khidir, bahwa ketika Musa berkata tidak ada yang lebih berilmu darinya di bumi, Allah mewahyukan kepadanya: 'Di bumi ada orang yang lebih berilmu darimu — pergilah mencarinya.'

163.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding the story of Musa and al-Khidr — that they met at a rock by the sea.
163.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang kisah Musa dan Khidir — bahwa mereka bertemu di sebuah batu di tepi laut.

164.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ that al-Khidr was a prophet.
164.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa Khidir adalah seorang nabi.

165.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ recited the Quran to him on one reading, and the next year two readings.
165.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ membacakan Al-Quran kepadanya satu kali pada satu tahun, dan dua kali pada tahun berikutnya.

166.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said about al-Khidr: 'He was given knowledge of something that Musa was not given.'
166.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata tentang Khidir: 'Ia diberi pengetahuan tentang sesuatu yang tidak diberikan kepada Musa.'

167.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that when Jibril struck Zamzam with his heel, Hajar the mother of Ismail began gathering the sand. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'May Allah have mercy on Hajar, the mother of Ismail — had she left it, it would have been a flowing spring.'
167.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika Jibril menghentakkan tumitnya ke Zamzam, Hajar ibu Ismail mulai mengumpulkan pasir. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Semoga Allah merahmati Hajar, ibu Ismail — seandainya ia membiarkannya, niscaya akan menjadi mata air yang mengalir.'

168.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'May Allah have mercy on us and on Musa — if he had been patient, Allah would have told us more of his story. But he said: If I ask you about anything after this, do not keep company with me — you have reached my excuse.'
168.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Semoga Allah merahmati kita dan Musa — seandainya ia bersabar, Allah akan menceritakan lebih banyak kisahnya kepada kita. Tetapi ia berkata: Jika aku bertanya kepadamu tentang sesuatu setelah ini, jangan berteman denganku — kamu telah mencapai maafku.'

169.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ, regarding the verse: 'And remind them of the days of Allah,' said: 'The days of Allah means the blessings of Allah, Blessed and Exalted.'
169.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ, tentang ayat: 'Dan ingatkanlah mereka tentang hari-hari Allah,' bersabda: 'Hari-hari Allah berarti nikmat-nikmat Allah Tabaaraka wa Ta'ala.'

170.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through Ibn Abbas that the Prophet ﷺ, when he mentioned the prophets, would begin with himself, saying: 'May the mercy of Allah be upon us and upon Hud and upon Salih.'
170.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui Ibn Abbas bahwa Nabi ﷺ, ketika menyebutkan para nabi, akan memulai dengan dirinya sendiri, berkata: 'Semoga rahmat Allah atas kita dan atas Hud dan atas Salih.'

171.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ speak about the one whom Musa followed. He said: While Musa was sitting among a group of the Children of Israel, a man said to him: Is there anyone on earth more knowledgeable than you? He said: No.'
171.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ berbicara tentang orang yang diikuti Musa. Beliau bersabda: Sementara Musa duduk di antara sekelompok Bani Israil, seorang pria berkata kepadanya: Apakah ada orang di bumi yang lebih berilmu darimu? Ia berkata: Tidak.'

172.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Nothing entered my heart since I embraced Islam.' The rest of the hadith continues the narration.
172.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Tidak ada sesuatu yang masuk ke hatiku sejak aku memeluk Islam.' Sisa hadits melanjutkan narasi.

173.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through Anas that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The roof of my house was split open while I was in Makkah, and Jibril descended. He opened my chest, washed it with Zamzam water, then brought a golden basin filled with wisdom and faith and poured it into my chest, then sealed it.'
173.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui Anas bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Atap rumahku dibelah sementara aku di Makkah, dan Jibril turun. Ia membuka dadaku, mencucinya dengan air Zamzam, kemudian membawa wadah emas yang penuh dengan hikmah dan iman dan menuangkannya ke dalam dadaku, lalu menutupnya.'

174.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Allah has commanded me to present the Quran to you.' He said: 'Has my Lord named me to you?' He said: 'Yes.' He replied: 'Then by the grace of Allah and His mercy, let them rejoice in that.' This is how Ubayy used to recite it.
174.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah memerintahkanku untuk membacakan Al-Quran kepadamu.' Ia berkata: 'Apakah Rabb-ku menyebut namaku kepadamu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya.' Ia menjawab: 'Maka dengan karunia Allah dan rahmat-Nya, hendaklah mereka bergembira dengan itu.' Beginilah cara Ubayy membacanya.

175.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'What prevents me? By Allah, the Exalted says: Say: In the bounty of Allah and in His mercy — in that let them rejoice; it is better than what they accumulate. This is better.'
175.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Apa yang mencegah aku? Demi Allah, Allah Ta'ala berfirman: Katakanlah: Dengan karunia Allah dan rahmat-Nya — maka dengan itu hendaklah mereka bergembira; itu lebih baik dari apa yang mereka kumpulkan. Ini lebih baik.'

176.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Do not curse the wind. When you see from it something you dislike, say: O Allah, we ask You for the good of this wind and the good that is in it and the good for which it has been sent, and we seek refuge with You from its evil.'
176.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Jangan mencela angin. Ketika kalian melihat darinya sesuatu yang tidak kalian sukai, katakanlah: Ya Allah, kami memohon kepadamu kebaikan angin ini dan kebaikan yang ada di dalamnya dan kebaikan yang untuknya ia dikirim, dan kami berlindung kepadamu dari keburukannya.'

177.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not curse the wind, for it is from the breath of Allah, Blessed and Exalted. Ask Allah for its good, for the good that is in it, and for the good for which it has been sent, and seek refuge from its evil.'
177.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jangan mencela angin, karena ia dari napas Allah Tabaaraka wa Ta'ala. Mintalah kepada Allah kebaikannya, kebaikan yang ada di dalamnya, dan kebaikan yang untuknya ia dikirim, dan berlindunglah dari keburukannya.'

178.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ led the Fajr prayer and missed a verse. When he finished, Ubayy said: 'O Messenger of Allah, was this verse abrogated or did you forget it?' He said: 'Rather, I was caused to forget it.'
178.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengimami shalat Subuh dan melewatkan sebuah ayat. Ketika selesai, Ubayy berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah ayat ini dinasakh atau engkau melupakannya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak, aku dibuat lupa.'

179.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding the obligation of ablution after intercourse without ejaculation.
179.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang kewajiban wudhu setelah jimak tanpa ejakulasi.

180.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite in witr prayer: Glorify the name of your Lord, the Most High; and Say: O you disbelievers; and Say: He is Allah, the One. When he gave the salam, he would say three times: Glorified is the Sovereign, the Holy.
180.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membaca dalam shalat witir: Sabbihisma rabbikal-a'la; dan Qul yaa ayyuhal-kaafiruun; dan Qul huwallahu ahad. Ketika memberi salam, beliau mengucapkan tiga kali: Subhaanal-malikil-quddus.

181.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to teach them to say in the morning: 'We have entered the morning upon the natural disposition of Islam, the word of sincerity, the way of our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, and the religion of our father Ibrahim.'
181.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengajarkan mereka untuk mengucapkan di pagi hari: 'Kami memasuki pagi hari dalam fitrah Islam, kalimat ikhlas, sunnah Nabi kami Muhammad ﷺ, dan agama bapak kami Ibrahim.'

182.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ mentioned the Dajjal and said: 'One of his eyes is like a piece of green glass. And seek refuge with Allah from the punishment of the grave.'
182.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyebutkan Dajjal dan bersabda: 'Salah satu matanya seperti sepotong kaca hijau. Dan berlindunglah kepada Allah dari azab kubur.'

183.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said regarding the Dajjal what was mentioned — and the like of it was narrated.
183.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda tentang Dajjal apa yang disebutkan — dan yang serupa dengannya diriwayatkan.

184.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he recited a verse differently from Ibn Masud. They went to the Prophet ﷺ and he said: 'Both are correct.' He said: 'Do not end a verse of mercy with punishment, or a verse of punishment with mercy.'
184.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia membaca suatu ayat secara berbeda dari Ibn Masud. Mereka pergi kepada Nabi ﷺ dan beliau bersabda: 'Keduanya benar.' Beliau bersabda: 'Jangan mengakhiri ayat rahmat dengan azab, atau ayat azab dengan rahmat.'

185.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was greatly amazed and Jibril suddenly came to me. He said: O Ubayy, two angels came to me. One said: Recite on one mode. The other said: Add more. I kept saying: Add more, until we reached seven modes of recitation.'
185.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku sangat takjub dan tiba-tiba Jibril datang kepadaku. Ia berkata: Hai Ubayy, dua malaikat datang kepadaku. Satu berkata: Bacalah dengan satu huruf. Yang lain berkata: Tambahkan. Aku terus berkata: Tambahkan, sampai kami mencapai tujuh huruf.'

186.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Two angels came to me. One said to the other: Make him recite. He asked: On how many modes? He said: One. He said: Add more — until we reached seven modes of recitation.'
186.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Dua malaikat datang kepadaku. Salah satu berkata kepada yang lain: Suruhlah ia membaca. Ia bertanya: Dengan berapa huruf? Ia berkata: Satu. Ia berkata: Tambahkan — sampai kami mencapai tujuh huruf.'

187.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Verily some poetry contains wisdom.'
187.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya sebagian syair mengandung hikmah.'

188.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Verily some poetry contains wisdom.'
188.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya sebagian syair mengandung hikmah.'

189.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ' — and then the hadith was mentioned.
189.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ' — kemudian hadits disebutkan.

190.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Verily some poetry contains wisdom.'
190.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya sebagian syair mengandung hikmah.'

191.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Some poetry contains wisdom.'
191.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sebagian syair mengandung hikmah.'

192.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding found property that he was told: 'Recognize its count, its container, and its tie, then announce it for a year. If its owner comes, give it to him; otherwise it is like your own property.'
192.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang barang temuan bahwa ia diberitahu: 'Kenali jumlahnya, wadahnya, dan ikatannya, kemudian umumkan selama satu tahun. Jika pemiliknya datang, berikan kepadanya; jika tidak, itu seperti hartamu sendiri.'

193.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with a found item and was told: 'Announce it for a year.' He announced it for a year but no one recognized it. He came again and was told: 'Announce it for a year' — three times. Then he was told: 'Use it and remember its container and tie.'
193.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dengan barang temuan dan diberitahu: 'Umumkan selama satu tahun.' Ia mengumumkannya selama satu tahun tetapi tidak ada yang mengenalinya. Ia datang lagi dan diberitahu: 'Umumkan selama satu tahun' — tiga kali. Kemudian diberitahu: 'Gunakan dan ingat wadah dan ikatannya.'

194.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he found gold dinars and came to the Prophet ﷺ. He was told: 'Announce it for a year.' He announced it for a year and came back. He was told: 'Announce it for another year.' Then he was told: 'Use it, remember its tie and container and count, and if its owner comes...'
194.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia menemukan dinar emas dan datang kepada Nabi ﷺ. Ia diberitahu: 'Umumkan selama satu tahun.' Ia mengumumkannya dan kembali. Ia diberitahu: 'Umumkan satu tahun lagi.' Kemudian diberitahu: 'Gunakan, ingat ikatannya, wadahnya, dan jumlahnya, dan jika pemiliknya datang...'

195.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that regarding found property, he was told: 'Recognize its count, its container, and its tie, and benefit from it.'
195.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa tentang barang temuan, ia diberitahu: 'Kenali jumlahnya, wadahnya, dan ikatannya, dan manfaatkanlah.'

196.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ recited the Quran to him one year and said: 'My Lord, Blessed and Exalted, has commanded me to recite the Quran to you on one mode.' Then the next year he came again and said: 'Allah commands you to recite on seven modes of recitation.'
196.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ membacakan Al-Quran kepadanya satu tahun dan bersabda: 'Rabb-ku Tabaaraka wa Ta'ala memerintahkan aku untuk membacakan Al-Quran kepadamu dengan satu huruf.' Kemudian tahun berikutnya datang lagi dan bersabda: 'Allah memerintahkanmu untuk membaca dengan tujuh huruf.'

197.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Angel came a second time and said: 'Allah commands you to make your nation recite the Quran on two modes.' He said: 'I ask Allah for His pardon and forgiveness — my nation cannot bear that.' Then a third time he came and said: 'Allah commands you to make them recite on three modes.'
197.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Malaikat datang kedua kali dan berkata: 'Allah memerintahkanmu untuk membuat umatmu membaca Al-Quran dengan dua huruf.' Ia berkata: 'Aku memohon maaf dan ampunan Allah — umatku tidak mampu menanggung itu.' Kemudian ketiga kali datang dan berkata: 'Allah memerintahkanmu untuk membuat mereka membaca dengan tiga huruf.'

198.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding the verse: 'And We will make them taste the nearer punishment before the greater punishment,' that he said: 'Calamities and the smoke have passed, and the mighty grip and the prolonged affliction remain.'
198.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang ayat: 'Dan Kami akan memberi mereka rasa azab yang lebih dekat sebelum azab yang lebih besar,' bahwa ia berkata: 'Bencana-bencana dan asap telah berlalu, dan cengkeraman yang kuat dan kesulitan yang berkepanjangan masih tersisa.'

199.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was with the Prophet ﷺ when a Bedouin came and said: 'O Prophet of Allah, I have a brother who is suffering.' He asked: 'What is his ailment?' He said: 'He has epilepsy.' He said: 'Bring him to me.' The Prophet ﷺ then recited over him the Opening of the Book and four verses from the beginning of Al-Baqarah.
199.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bersama Nabi ﷺ ketika seorang Badui datang dan berkata: 'Ya Nabi Allah, aku memiliki saudara yang menderita.' Beliau bertanya: 'Apa penyakitnya?' Ia berkata: 'Ia mengalami gangguan jiwa.' Beliau bersabda: 'Bawa dia kepadaku.' Nabi ﷺ kemudian membaca atas dirinya pembukaan Kitab dan empat ayat dari awal Al-Baqarah.

200.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that Jibril (peace be upon him) came to the Prophet ﷺ while he was at the waterways of Banu Ghifar and said: 'O Muhammad, Allah commands you to make your nation recite the Quran on one mode.' He kept increasing it until it reached seven modes of recitation.
200.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Jibril (alaihi salam) datang kepada Nabi ﷺ sementara beliau berada di dekat kolam air Banu Ghifar dan berkata: 'Ya Muhammad, Allah memerintahkanmu untuk membuat umatmu membaca Al-Quran dengan satu huruf.' Ia terus menambah hingga mencapai tujuh huruf.
